heading: Welcome
text: Welcome DU-1080-HW4 ATP Function Documentation.documentation provides API reference supported ATP instruments.

heading: Overview
text: Controls communication AGM DU Test Box.

heading: Overview
text:
DAQ module provides interfaces controlling NI DATA Acquisition device used DU1080 HW4 ATP software.
supports analog voltage output, counter pulse generation, pulse configuration, task control, device cleanup NI-DAQmx library.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall DAQInitialize(char *resource_name, ViBoolean *test_result, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Initializes DAQ analog output channel writes initial voltage value verify DAQ Resource available.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall DAQSetVoltage(char *resource_name, float64 voltage_level, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Sets specified analog output voltage DAQ channel.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall DAQClose(char *resource_name, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Closes DAQ analog output channel writing zero voltage specified resource releasing associated DAQ task.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall DAQCounterPulseGeneration(char *resource_name, float intial_delay, float , float , char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Generates finite counter pulse using specified initial delay, time, time.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall DAQCounterPulseConfigStart(char *resource_name, TaskHandle *daq_handle, float initial_delay, int initial_state, float frequency, float duty_cycle, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Creates starts continuous counter pulse output task using specified frequency, duty cycle, initial delay, output idle state. created task handle returned pulse generation can continue explicitly stopped.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall DAQCountPulseClearOff(TaskHandle daq_task_handle, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Clear pulse count daq_task_handle.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall DAQCounterStateGeneration(char *resource_name, float intial_delay, int default_state, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Generates counter output specified default idle state initial delay.

heading: Overview
text: GraphicsDiscreteIO module provides interfaces reading testing discrete input signals used DU1080 HW4 ATP software. supports discrete status checks external interfaces, including graphic-related discrete inputs, NIC discrete inputs, digital signal logic verification.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall GraphicsExternalDSIStatus(int telnet_handle, char *pin, int *data_out);

heading: Purpose
text: Read status graphics processor discrete input using specified virtual pin name.

heading: Header
code: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall DSIAnalogResetLogicTest(int telnet_handle, ViBoolean *bit_pass, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Performs analog reset logic verification controlling AV reset signal checking corresponding discrete input output states.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall NICExternalDSIStatus(int telnet_handle, char *pin, int *data_out);

heading: Purpose
text: Reads status NIC discrete input using specified virtual pin name.

heading: Header
text: int PinStringToPinIndex(char *pin_string);

heading: Purpose
text: Converts virtual pin name corresponding pin index. function validates input string format extracting numeric portion.

heading: Header
text: int RetrieveData(int data, int bit_mask, int *final_data);

heading: Purpose
text: Applies bit mask input data converts result binary discrete value.

heading: Header
text: int WriteDiscreteData(int telnet_handle, unsigned long address, uint32_t data, unsigned int bit_mask);

heading: Purpose
text: Writes bit-masked discrete data specified device register verifies write operation completed successfully.

heading: Header
text: int ReadDiscreteData(int telnet_handle, unsigned long address, uint32_t *final_data, int bit_mask);

heading: Purpose
text: Reads discrete register data specified address applies bit mask returning result.

heading: Header
text: int ReadNICDiscreteData(int telnet_handle, unsigned long address, uint32_t *final_data, int bit_mask);

heading: Purpose
text: Reads discrete data Network Interface Card (NIC), extracts returned register value HBIT response, applies specified bit mask, stores masked result.

heading: Overview
text: MUX module controls NI Switch hardware used DU1080 HW4 ATP system. manages switch initialization, relay control, signal routing, session cleanup. module provides software interface connecting disconnecting signal paths required automated testing.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall MUXInitialize(char *resource_name, char *topology, ViSession *session, ViBoolean *test_result, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Initializes NI Switch MUX device using specified resource name topology. function returns initialized switch session, reports whether initialization succeeded, generates status message describing result.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall MUXSet(ViSession session, char *channel_1, char *channel_2, int operation);

heading: Purpose
text:
function controls open close state switch.
### Parameter {-}
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|——————|————-|————-|
| session | ViSession | NI Switch session|
| *channel_1 | char |First channel|
| *channel_2 | char |Second channel|
| operation | int |operation execution|

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall MUXClose(ViSession session, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Resets NI Switch device closes switch session.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall MUXOpenAllRelays(ViSession session);

heading: Purpose
text: Open relays NI Switch module resets switch.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall MUXSignalSet(ViSession session, char *signal_name, void **signal_list, char *status_message);

heading: Purpose
text: Searches signal list specified signal executes corresponding MUX switching operation.

heading: Overview
text: module designed drive ARINC429 ARINC708 functions MaxT FM429 Device.

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall MxFoundationInitialize(void);

heading: Purpose
text: Initializes MxFoundation system, obtains device handle, configures system time base, initializes ARINC 429 ARINC 708 Channels.

heading: Parameter
text: function parameters.

heading: Example
text:
int32 error = 0;
error = ARINC429ChannelInitialize();

heading: Header
text: void DLLEXPORT __stdcall MxFoundationClose(void);

heading: Purpose
text: Terminates MxFoundation system connection disconnects server, resets initialization status.

heading: Parameter
text: function parameters.

heading: Return Value
text: function return value.

heading: Example
text: MxFoundationClose();

heading: Header
text: int DLLEXPORT __stdcall ARINC429ChannelInitialize(void);

heading: Purpose
text: Initializes ARINC 429 transmit receive channels MxFoundation device. function obtains module handles, configures module attributes, retrieves channel handles, prepares channels subsequent ARINC 429 transmit receive operations.

heading: Parameter
text: function parameter.

heading: Header

heading: Purpose

heading: Header

heading: Example
Header
text: void DLLEXPORT __stdcall Arinc429FreeBuffers(HMXF_BUFFER arinc429_transmit_buffer, HMXF_BUFFER arinc429_receive_buffer, HMXF_SCHED arinc429_schedule_handle);

heading: Purpose
text: Releases ARINC 429 periodic transmission schedule transmit buffer. also stops closes receive acquisition buffer.

text: function return value.

heading: Header
text: void Arinc708DisplayDataArray(uint64 record_number, MXF_A708_DATAREC* record);

heading: Purpose
text:
Displays contents one ARINC 708 data records debugging verification.
### Parameter {-}
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|——————|————-|————-|
| record_number | uint64 | Number ARINC 708 records display.|
| rec | MXF_A708_DATAREC * | Pointer first ARINC 708 data record.|

heading: Return Value
text: function doesn’t return value.
